# Devlog: launch post for itch.io

Paste into a new devlog on https://dorfid.itch.io/performative-wizards
(itch devlogs take this markdown nearly as-is). Attach before posting:
GIF 1 (the FINALE cash-out), GIF 2 (the Critic's stamp → map badge), and
2–3 screenshots from `dist/screenshots/` (combat, map, collection).

---

**Title:** She's watching. The Performative Wizards demo is OUT.

---

I made a roguelike deckbuilder where the hardest enemy doesn't attack you.
**She reviews you.**

**[▶ Play it free, in your browser](https://dorfid.itch.io/performative-wizards)** — no install, no account. macOS download on the same page.

## What is this?

*Performative Wizards* is a Slay-the-Spire-like where your power is **the
fit**. You bank **Aura** mid-fight, light up tiers (+damage, +draw, pierce…
up to the spotlight), and then cash it ALL out on one filthy finisher.
You fight very ordinary things that have had enough: an Angry Toaster, a
Possessed Router, a Gym Rat, eventually The Algorithm itself.

And the whole time, **The Critic** is in the room.

## The hook: a rival who grades you

Every single fight gets a live letter grade — **S, A, B or C** — scored not
on whether you won, but on *how boldly you played your Aura*. And her review
rewrites the map:

- Serve an **S** and a VIP room opens ahead (richer rewards).
- Flop a **C** and she sends a **heckler** into your next fight, personally.
- Her **taste drifts** — repeat your winning trick and it stops paying.
  Variety is the meta.

You can even run into her off duty. Send over a matcha and she might
pre-write a rave. Roast her latte order and… well. 50/50.

## What's in the demo

- **3 wizards**, two build archetypes each — Vesper (It Girl, fire), Morticia
  (Goth Bestie, summon-and-sacrifice), Chadwick (the Rizzard, crit storm)
- **58 cards · 24 enemies · 19 fits · 14 relics · 11 events**, 3 acts plus an
  ascension ladder, 30–45 minutes a run
- Quit-safe **run saves**, a first-fight tutorial, draw/discard counters with
  a card that lets you *pick* your next draw
- **English / Deutsch / Español** — auto-detected
- All art and audio generated by code. Every pixel and bleep is homemade.

## It's open source

The whole game is **AGPL-3.0 on GitHub**:
https://github.com/dominikdorfstetter/performative-wizard
Read it, mod it, learn from it — contributions welcome (there's a
CONTRIBUTING.md with the house rules).

## Tell me everything

This is a demo, and I want the unfiltered review — the Critic can take it
and so can I:

- 💬 **Discord:** https://discord.gg/bXppC4WdNb — post your grades, builds,
  and hot takes (#fits wants your FINALE screenshots)
- 🐛 **Bugs:** https://github.com/dominikdorfstetter/performative-wizard/issues
- ⭐ If a run made you grin, an itch rating genuinely helps tiny games get seen.

**Especially looking for:** does the Aura hoard-vs-spend decision stay
interesting in act 3? Is any wizard clearly the strongest at ascension 4+?
Which event made you laugh?

## What's next

A pile-inspection overlay, true scry/tutor cards, more Critic events, longer
music phrases — and whatever the feedback says louder than I expected.

She's watching. Win the room. 🎭

---

**macOS note for the page footer:** the app is ad-hoc signed — on first
launch use **System Settings → Privacy & Security → Open Anyway** (macOS 15+)
or right-click → Open (macOS 14 and older). Full steps ship in the zip's
README.txt.
